channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: GM is pulling the funding for its Cruise robotaxi company
item.description: General Motors is pulling funding from robotaxi company Cruise in order to focus on its own autonomous and assisted-driving systems.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Meta contractor dismissed threats to moderators from Ethiopia rebels
item.description: A contractor hired by Facebook’s parent company Meta dismissed threats to content moderators by Ethiopian rebels angered by their work, according to new evidence filed in a case challenging the dismissal of dozens of moderators in Kenya.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump taps FTC Commissioner Andrew Ferguson to chair agency
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Andrew Ferguson, a commissioner at the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), as the next head of the independent agency.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Gentrace makes it easier for businesses to test AI-powered software
item.description: As businesses continue to integrate generative AI into their products, many find it challenging to actually test whether the AI is behaving correctly and giving useful answers.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Defense Department Components Get More Flexibility in Cybersecurity Procurement
item.description: NDAA compromise bill modifies provision, allows DoD components to independently procure cybersecurity services
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: In 2025, AI will elevate the CIO role. Here’s why
item.description: AI has already affected the CIO role, and next year will be no different. In 2025, the technology will test CIOs in new ways while also elevating their role as they process the speed at which AI is being adopted—both internally and externally.
item.dc:creator: Felix Van de Maele, Fast Company

item.title: A hardwired TSA looks to the future with 5G implementation
item.description: At TSA most of their critical network infrastructure is hardwired. That includes checkpoint equipment and computers operated by the TSOs. The post A hardwired TSA looks to the future with 5G implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: How Big Tech labor organizers aim to unite for Trump 2.0
item.description: Donald Trump’s first electoral victory forever changed the culture inside big tech firms. What had been nascent worker organizing efforts turned into mass movements to protest their companies’ politics, environmental practices, treatment of contract workers, handling of harassment cases, and more.
item.dc:creator: Sean Captain, Fast Company

item.title: Kylie Kelce unseats Joe Rogan as top podcast with debut episode
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of former NFL player turned media personality Jason Kelce, beat out Joe Rogan for the top podcast spot on both Apple and Spotify this week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Setapp survey reveals what Mac developers are thinking about right now
item.description: Mac developers have a lot to think about as we close in on 2025, the eighth Mac developer survey from Setapp suggests.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose pushes AI to provide better government to constituents
item.description: The collaboration between members of the GovAI coalition is spurring the adoption of new technologies and AI-solutions by government agencies.
item.dc:creator: Devan Patel, The Mercury News

item.title: US approves export of AI chips to UAE amid Microsoft-G42 partnership
item.description: The US government has approved the export of advanced AI chips to a Microsoft-run facility in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), marking a significant step in the tech giant’s partnership with Emirati AI firm G42.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Data center certifications target newcomers, experts, and sustainability pros
item.description: As data centers evolve from traditional compute and storage facilities into AI powerhouses, the demand for qualified professionals continues to grow exponentially and salaries are high.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Struggling to hear TV dialogue? Try these simple fixes
item.description: If it sounds like actors on your TV are speaking in whispers, there's a way to fix it to make your TV audio sound better. The CyberGuy has several tips.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI releases o1 LLM, unveils ChatGPT Pro
item.description: OpenAI has officially released its OpenAI o1 large language model (LLM), built for complex reasoning. The company also introduced ChatGPT Pro, a $200 monthly plan that includes unlimited access to OpenAI o1, o1-mini, GPT-4o, and advanced voice conversations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Public cloud providers are fumbling the AI opportunity
item.description: Generative AI is exploding and will continue to do so. As such, both on-premises and public cloud providers have seen a boom in demand for their AI wares, which will likely continue for at least the next five years. Cloud is, of course, a core benefit of companies’ intererest in AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Telework, IT modernization emerge as early DOGE targets
item.description: The plans for DOGE continue to evolve, but some early themes are emerging as lawmakers start to weigh in with their own ideas. The post Telework, IT modernization emerge as early DOGE targets first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on Android
item.description: If unwanted text messages are piling up in your Android inbox, there are some easy steps you can take to clean things up and keep them organized.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KRON4
